titleStmt.title: SII 9.249: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 249. (A.R. No. 211 of 1913.) ON A STONE LYING IN THE SURYANARAYANA TEMPLE AT KOLUR, BELLARY TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated the 10th year of the Chāḷukya king Jakadēkamalladēva, Prabhava, Pushya, śu. 2, Bṛihaspativāra, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa corresponding to A.D. 1147 December 25 Thursday, f.d.t. ·41. Rēva-Gāvuṇḍa of Phaṇi-vaṁśa, whose family is described at length, is stated to have built temples of Sōmēśvara, Kāḷēśvara, Mallikārjuna, Āditya, Vighnēśvara, Bhairava and Mēḷēśvara and, along with his brother-in-law, Viṭṭiseṭṭi, to have built the temple of Vishṇu. He also constructed a well with a Śiva temple and a tank outside the village. He got money for these acts of charity by selling all the property he had. Irmaḍi-Bhīmarasa is stated to have granted some plots of and for the worship and other services of each of these gods. The Nandas and the Mauryas are mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Ōṁ namaśśivāya . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbha
mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . viśuddhajñānadēhāya trivēdē(dī) divyacakṣuṣē śrē
yaḥprāptanimittāya namassōmārddhadhāriṇē . śrīmadgaurīpriyaṁ trai
bhuvanabhavanarakṣakṣamaṁ dēvadēvaṁ kāmadhvaṁsaṁ trinētraṁ tripuravija
yiyardhdhēṁdumauḷirvviṣāṁkaṁ . vyōmāṁburvvahnivāyurddharaṇicaritanatyaṁtaśuddhaṁ gaṇē
śaṁ śrīmatkāḷēśvaraṁ māḷkabhimataphaḷamaṁ rēvagauḍaṁge niccaṁ . vasudhākāṁteya kuṁtaḷaprati
mamādī kuṁtaḷakṣōṇiyaṁ vasudhānaṁdananaṁdaguptakulamauryyakṣmāparāḷdarbbaḷikkeseyalu
rāṣṭranṛpāḷarāḷdaravariṁdaṁ matte cāḷukyavaṁśasamudbhūtaranēkarāḷdaravaroḷtāṁ cakri sōmēśvaraṁ .
pāḷisidaṁ dhareyaṁ bhūpāḷajanastutyanappa sōmēśvaraniṁ pāḷisidaṁ tattanayaṁ līleyoḷava
niyane cakri jagadēkanṛpaṁ . Ātana bhujabalamī jagatītaḷadoḷageṇipoḍaṁ tadupamātītaṁ bhūtaḷadara
sugaḷiṁ dhavaḷātapamaṁ tanage piḍisi rājyaṁgeydaṁ . jagadoḷage peṟarbhbhūbhujarogeduddaṁḍadoḷe negaḷe koṁdavaraṁ
dhātrigeyorbbane patiyādoḍe jagadēkanṛpāḷanāmamāytanvartthaṁ . svasti śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājā
dhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satāśyrayakuḷatiḷaka cāḷukyakuḷakamaḷamārttaṁḍaṁ cāḷukyarājyāṁ
bhōnidhipravarddhanacaṁdranappa śrīmaccāḷukya cakravartti jagadēkamallaṁ kuntaḷasaptārdhdhalakṣamaṁ duṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapa
ripāḷanārtthaṁ pāḷisuttaṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ kalyāṇadoḷu nelevīḍāgi rājyaṁgeyuttamire . beḷageyyiṁ poṁgaṇi
yiṁ phalataruviṁdoḷpayaṁgaḷiṁ kusumarajāniḷaniṁ pagareya pariyiṁ taḷarada siri ballakuṁ
denāḷkesedirkkuṁ . Ā nāḍiṁgadhināthaṁ śrīnārīkāṁtanamaḷaguṇagaṇaniḷayaṁ bhānurucisadṛśatējaṁ tānene siṁ
dakulatilakanirmmaḍibhīmaṁ . phaṇivaṁśakamaḷadinapaṁ phaṇivaṁśāṁbhōdhivardhdhamāna śaśāṁkaṁ phaṇivaṁśakumudacaṁdraṁ pha
ṇivaṁśalalāṭatiḷakanirmmaḍibhīmaṁ . Ā bhīmanṛpāvarajaṁ śōbhāvahamūrttiyarinarācaḷavajraṁ vaibhava
yakṣaṁ gītaprābhavanene negaḷda rācamallanṛpāḷaṁ . bhīmanṛparācamallarttāmutsavadiṁ dharitriyaṁ pāḷi
sutuṁ kṣēmadinire janamellaṁ śrīmahimāspadake tāme neleyāgirpparu . surakujadaṁtiraloppu
ttiruhudu tāṁ ballakuṁdenāḍadaṟoḷu vistaradiṁ paṇtoḷugoṁbena varasasyasamṛddhaphaḷadi kōḷū
reseguṁ . Ā purada kōṭeyaṁ sadgōpuramaṁ poṟage baḷasidārameyaṁ mattā pariva nadiyumaṁ vā
ṇīpati pogaḷalke neṟeyanuḷidavaraḷavē . malligeyiṁ kēdageyiṁ molleyinadirmmutte suragiyā pā
dariyiṁ mellane tīḍuva gāḷiyoḷelleḍeyuṁ kusumarajade raṁjisutirkkuṁ bāḷesuniṁbe māduphalamī
ḷe beḍaṁgenisirdda māvu kaṁcīḷa kavuṁgu teṁgu palasurbbida karbbina tōṁṭamaṁgajaṁgāḷayamappa tāvaregoḷaṁ keṟe bā
vigaḷiṁ bahirvvanaṁ līḷeyanuṁṭumāḍuvudu nōḷpara cittadoḷāva kālamuṁ . beḷadoṟagida kaḷameya maḍiga
ḷa poṟagaṁ sutti nilta beḷegeyyiṁdaṁ phaḷataruvanadiṁ sirigidu niḷayamenalu celvuvaḍegumā polanellaṁ beḷedu phaḷa
bharadineṟagirddeḷejōḷada keygaḷaṁ manōhari kāntākuḷameḷasuva giḷi sovarbaḷaluḍamuḍi bennanaleye dhava
ḷēkṣaṇeyaru . beḷedoppuva bahudhānyāvaḷiyiṁdaṁ śāḷimaḍigaḷiṁdoḷvanadiṁ baḷasida dēvālayadiṁ
deḷeyoḷu kaḍucelvuvaḍedu kōḷūreseguṁ . janakaṁ kāḷeyagauḍaṁ jananute tāymalliyakkanantava
rge sutaṁ janayisida rēvagauḍaṁ manunibhananvitanadarkke tāṁ gāvuṁḍaṁ . Ā kōḷūra prabhu maṁdākiniyaṁtamaḷakīrtti
yaṁ taḷedirppaṁ lōkastute mallavvegamā kāḷimayaṁge puṭṭidanagratanūjaṁ . jananutarēvagavuṁḍaṁganujaru hari
yaṁmagauḍa saṁkaragauḍaṁ manunibhanāyakagauḍaṁganujeyaroppuvaru mailamaṁ hālamanuṁ . śrī
manumārgganappa vibhu rēvagavuṁḍana taṁge mailamaṁ gōminiyannaḷākeya varaṁ hariyaṁnanenippa duggaṇaṁ kā
manamūrttiyaṁtavarge puṭṭida putranudāri dēvaṇaṁ dēmaleyeṁbaḷātana manaḥpriye tāṁ retiyaṁtiroppuvaḷ .
Ā vibhu rēvagauḍana manōhari cākabagauḍigaṁ sutarddēvatarussusākhevolu puṭṭidarā hariyammagauḍanuṁ
bhāvajanaṁnanappa guṇi kāḷeyagauḍanumapramattasauryyāvahamūrtti mādhavanumādaraniṁditapuṇyabhā
gigaḷu . suratarukayvōdudenalu suradhēnuva toredabhīṣṭamaṁ kaṟedudenalu dharegittu vittamaṁ tāṁ parayisidaṁ
jasamanagrajaṁ hariyaṁmaṁ . divijatarukusumadiṁ baḷikavatarisida phalame lēsenippavōlavariṁdave baḷike puṭṭi mādhava
navaniyoḷutukriṣṭapuṇyanādaṁ nijadiṁ . paḍevaṁ dhanamaṁ bēḍidareḍaraṁ kaḷeyalke nuḍivanōrnnuḍiyaṁ tāṁ kaḍevarame
ydalu nuḍivaṁ mṛḍabhaktanagaṇyapuṇyanidhi mahadēvaṁ . pogaḷadiraṇnamānavaroḷārumanā baliyaṁ dadhīciyaṁ
khagapatiyaṁ dinēśasutanaṁ pogaḷdiṁ baḷikittalorbbanaṁ pogaḷu manōjasannibhananāhavadhīrananatyudāranaṁ
pagevara māriyaṁ negaḷda saudharemādiyanārppinādiyaṁ . baṟasiḍilu pagege tannaṁ maṟevokka naraṁge vajrapaṁja
rameredargguṟe koḍuva cāgadiṁdaṁ nere pōltaṁ kalpavṛkṣamaṁ mahadēvaṁ . bāvaṁnanirataṁ taṁdāvagamoṁdeseyo
ḷiṭṭu taṁnaṁ pratiyiṭṭa vīraroḍane tūgidoḍōvata vīrakke mādhavaṁ gelevaṁdaṁ . paṇamuḷḷaṁgellamuṁṭaṁte
mage baṟide baṁdiṣṭaruṁ śiṣṭaruṁ maṁtaṇadiṁ kuḷḷirddu nīmeṁnoḷu paḍeyalu pēḷbaṁdire Īyanīyeṁ guṇi
gaḷgīvaṁtu nānēṁ maruḷe kuḍuvenaṁnartthamaṁ bhūmipāḷargguṇaleṁbī lōbhanaṁ bēḍade budha koḍuvaṁ
mādiyaṁ bēḍu niccaṁ . raseyaṁtaṁ nāṁṭi dikpāḷara grihatatiya parbbi digdaṁtiyaṁ vēṣṭisi saptādrīṁdrakūṭakkaḍardu
saradhiyaṁ dāṁṭi meyvercci mattāgasadoḷmaṁḍaysi nakṣatrame kusumaphaḷaṁ caṁdrasūryyarkkaḷā kīrttisurāva
licayakkāgire baḷedudeṁdī lōkadoḷmādiyiṁdaṁ . Ātana kulavadhu guṇadiṁ sītege rugmiṇige migilenippaḷu
baṁdhuvrātakke surabhiyannaḷu bhūtaḷadoḷpōlva peṁḍirārmmāramanaṁ . Ā yirvvarggaṁ tanujarśśrīyadhi
parccalada balada kaṇigaḷu kīrttiśrīyoḍeyarbbalanuṁ nārāyaṇarene rēvagauḍanuṁ hariyamanuṁ .

śrīrāmādhipanenisirddā rāmaṁ dinapatējanappādityaṁ bhūribhujaśauryyaranu
pamarārādhitapuṇyaravarge sōdararādar . Agrajanavaroḷu sakalaguṇā
graṇyaṁ dānadharmmaśīḷaniyuktaṁ vigrahadhīraṁ śivapādāgradoḷavicaḷamanasvi rēvagavuṁ
ḍaṁ . balupinoḷaṁ tējadoḷaṁ caladoḷamaudāryyaguṇadoḷaṁ rūpinoḷaṁ sallalita
vappaṟitadoḷaṁ geluvavannarggāṇe rēvagauṁḍaṁgeḷeyol . Iṁtanujara tattanujara santati perccu
ttamiralu sukhadiṁdirutuṁ tāṁ taḍeyade māḍisidaṁ saṁtōsadiṁ rēvagauḍanī śi
vagṛhamaṁ . permmaṁ baḍeduṁ maḍagidoḍormmeye tāṁ kiḍugumeṁdu rēvagavuṁḍaṁ dharmmakke tavisi dha
namaṁ nirmmisidaṁ śivagṛhaṁgaḷaṁ mudadiṁdaṁ . sōmēśvarakāḷēśvaranāmade māḍisida
neraḍuṁ gṛhamaṁ modaloḷ śrīmallikārjunōttamadhāmamanalliṁ baḷikke rēvagavuṁḍaṁ .
Ādityagṛhamanoṁdaṁ mēdiniyoḷu karame celvenelu māḍisidaṁ śrīdayitanamaḷa
guṇanuditōditasatpuṇyamūrtti rēvagavuṁḍaṁ . śrīviṣṇugṛhamaṁ sadbhāvade māḍi
sidanadhikaguṇagaṇaniḷayaṁ śrīviṭṭiseṭṭiyeṁbaṁ rēvagavuṁḍanalu kūḍi yātana bhā
vaṁ . vighnatatiyellamaṁ nirvvighnaṁ māḷpudeṁdu piridutsavadiṁ vighnēśvaragṛhamaṁ nirvighnade mā
ḍisidaneseye rēvagavuṁḍaṁ . Avaṟa keladalli bhairavabhavanamumaṁ celvanenalu mēḷēśvarasa
nnivasanamaṁ māḍisidaṁ vivēkanidhiyenisi negaḷda rēvagavuṁḍaṁ . Ūriṁde mūḍalati vistārade kalvesadege
ysi bāviyanadaṟoḷu cāru śivagṛhamanaydanudāraṁ sameyisidanoppe rēvagavuṁḍaṁ . .
Adaṟa keladalliyāramevudiviṁdaṁ taṇneḷalgaḷiṁ tiḷinīriṁdodavida taṭākamoṁdaṁ mudadiṁ kaṭṭi
sidaneseye rēvagavuṁḍaṁ . paḍedoḍameyoḷanitinitaṁ maḍagade keṟebāvidēgulaṁgaḷa kelasakko
ḍameyane tavisi dharmmamanuḍugade baytiṭṭaniṁtu rēvugavuṁḍaṁ . svasti śrīmaccāḷukyavikrama
pratāpacakravartti jagadēkamallavarṣada 10 neya prabhavasaṁvatsarada puṣya śuddha 2 bri
haspativāradaṁduttarāyaṇasaṁkramaṇa nimittavāgi svasti śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara
nirmmaḍibhīmadēvarasaruṁ rēvagāvuṁḍaṁ māḍisida śivālayaṁgaḷge pūjepunaskāranivēdyakkaṁ
jīrnnōddhārakkameṁdu biṭṭa bhūmiyayvattāṟu gēṇa ghaḷeya(ṁ) nīḷada bhujeyaṁ dviguṇisi
yagaladoḷoṁdakūḍi guṇisuvī kramadaḷateyalu śrīsōmēśvaradēvarggūriṁmū
ḍa kagguṟukeyiṁ teṁka mattaru mūṟu 3 śrīkāḷēśvaradēvargge huggigalliṁda teṁkalu
Oḍḍihaṭṭiya holavēreyiṁ mūḍa mattareraḍu 2 Ā yeraḍu sthānavaṁ rudraśaktijīyargge dhā
rāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru . śrīmallikārjunadēvargge Araḷiya bāgiṁ paḍuvalu mattarera
ḍu 2 haḷḷadiṁ baḍagaṇa tōṁṭada kamma 300 Ā dēvara sthānamaṁ kēśavajīyargge dhārāpūrvva
kaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru śrīmadādityadēvargge huggigalliṁ teṁkalu mattareraḍu 2 Ā dēvara sthānamaṁ
kāmarāsipaṇḍitargge dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru śrīkēśavadēvargge Ūriṁ paḍuvalu kabbaḷḷa
diṁ mūḍamattarāṟu 6 Ā dēvarasthānemaṁ Āyitamarasaṁge dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru śrī
vināyakadēvargge Ūriṁ paḍuvalaraḷiya bāgiṁ mūḍalu mattaru Eraḍu 2 śrībhaira
vadēvarge Ūriṁ paḍuvaṇa cauḍeyana keṟeyiṁ paḍuvalu mattareraḍu 2 Ūriṁ baḍaga
lā dēvargge biṭṭa hūdōṁṭa voṁdu 1 Ā yeraḍu sthānamaṁ sōmajīyaṁge dhārāpū
rbbakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru śrīmēḷēśvaradēvargge Ūriṁ mūḍaṇa kagguṟukeyiṁ mūḍa
lu mattaru mūṟu 3 siddhēśvaradēvargge kuṟukeyiṁ baḍaga mattaru Oṁdu 1 tōṁṭa 1
samasta prajegaḷa rāsiyalu dhānyagoḷaga 1 Aṁtā sthānamaṁ mādijīyaṁge dhārā
pūrvvakaṁ koṭṭaru . bāviya paṁcaliṁgadēvargge Ūriṁ teṁkaṇa hiriya būdivāṭiṁ
teṁka baḷḷareya dāriyiṁ mūḍalu mattaru nālku 4 tōṭa 1 saṁgamēśvaradēvargge
neladōṇiyiṁ mūḍa mattaroṁdu 1 śrīkēśavadēvargge Ūriṁ paḍuvaṇa hūdōṁṭa mo
geya kamma 200 Ā dēvargge soḍareṇnege gāṇa 1 sōmēśvarakāḷēśvaradēvargge gāṇa 1 śrī
mallikārjjunadēvargge gāṇa 1 Ā dēvarggellaṁ kūḍi biṭṭa yele hēriṁge Ele 100
davasadhānyadalu hoṁgāyaṁ māna 1 saṁkhada dāsamōjaṁ dēvara bhōgakke biṭṭa
mattaroṁdu 1 Iṁtinituṁ sarbbābādhāparihāravāgi biṭṭa samastadattiya sthiraśāsanaṁ
kulagiriyuṁ jaḷanidhiyuṁ nelanuṁ sasisūryyaruḷḷinaṁ sthiramirkkokkalaku
ladoḷkuḍiyenisida kulamaṁtaṁ rēvagauḍamāḍida dharmmaṁ . Ettaṇa śā
sanamiṁtidanittavarāreṁdu nuḍidu dharmakkaḷivaṁ pattisuva pāpi puḷu poṇmuttire
bāyoḷage sattu narakakkiḷivaṁ . Elliya śāsanaminitumanilladudaṁ baredareṁdu dharmmada
kēḍaṁ solliḍuva pāpi puḷugaḷave ge bāyoḷage sattu narakakkiḷuguṁ . svadattāṁ para
dattāṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ . śaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.249 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
